From idea to reality, just like that. 🪄 See 3 interactive and stunning visual apps made with @googlegemini in Google AI Studio.

Wanna meet Larry? 🏆👀 @nba expert trophy handler Katy Snyder answers the top-trending searches about the most-prized trophy in basketball. Tell us, who do you think will be taking Larry home this year? 

The NBA Finals continue tonight!

Proud sponsor of the NBA.

For ongoing tasks you find yourself searching for over and over, like planning a wedding or managing a home move, Search will soon be able to build you custom experiences with Antigravity. Think of them as mini apps or trackers you can continue to come back to regularly.

Here’s @robby, VP of Product at Search, demoing the new feature on the #GoogleIO stage.
the highlight reel: 🎢🎆🥰
Here’s your official recap on everything you need to know about the next era of Search. #GoogleIO

Our latest screenless wearable, Google Fitbit Air¹, available now.

¹Google Fitbit Air works with most phones running on Android 11 or higher and Apple iOS 16.4 or higher. Requires a Google Account and the Google Health app. Feature availability varies; some features require a Google Health Premium membership. Not intended for medical purposes. See g.co/health/fitbit-air and g.co/fitbit/compatibility for more information. 

¹Colors may vary and change over time with use. Not all colors are available in all areas. Accessory bands sold separately. Options may vary by country and retailer.

Jellyfish can DJ now!? 🪼

In collaboration with @montereybayaquarium, we built a generative music experiment where moon jellies controlled music made by Lyria 3, serving as the opening act at Google I/O!

The jellies were live streamed from their home at the Monterey Bay Aquarium. They were then tracked by a lightweight object detection model, running on Google’s tiny, low powered Coral NPU housed on a Synaptics Coralboard.

The Coralboard sent the jellies’ coordinates to our music generation engine. Each quadrant of the screen represented an instrument: drums, bass, chords or melody. The number of jellies in each quadrant determined the weighting of the Lyria 3 Pro generated music.

While it was technology that translated the jellies' movement into sound, the real magic came from the animals themselves.
For morning-ish people: Gemini Daily Brief builds a personalized daily agenda with your calendar & reminders #GeminiHacks 📲

Imagine your cat… but smaller than a lime 🔍 Open the Google app, hit Lens, tap the 🍌, take a photo of your furry friend, and pick a prompt to reimagine them micro-size.

Post yours and tag @google!

We are thrilled to announce the national winner of this year’s Doodle for Google competition 🏆👑

Out of thousands of entries from brilliant students nationwide, Kameirah received the most votes from the public and our judges to take the top spot. In celebration of her achievement, she has been awarded a $55,000 college scholarship alongside a $50,000 technology package for her school to help inspire the next generation of creators. Congratulations, Kameirah!

Check out the #GoogleDoodle today to see Kameirah’s winning masterpiece, Hair Power: The Crown That Grows From Us.

See how our community is using Gemini Omni features to create magic! ✨ From experimenting with dynamic camera angles and video styles to editing scenes with natural conversation, the possibilities are endless. What will you create next?

Available in @GoogleGemini, @GoogleFlow, and @YouTube Shorts
It all comes down to this 🏀🏆 The NBA Finals start tonight!
Gemini Spark is more than a passenger princess🚗👸It can help research and plan your itinerary as your 24/7 AI travel agent.
Still waiting for that picture-perfect moment? 🏄 Open the Google app, tap the 🍌 button, upload a picture or video frame, and let Search transform your pixels into perfection.

At #GoogleIO, we introduced @googlegemini Spark, your 24/7 personal AI agent that helps you navigate your digital life, taking action on your behalf and under your direction — and you can use it across mobile and desktop, even when your laptop is closed. It's available now to all Google AI Ultra subscribers in the U.S.

Here’s a peek at what it can do.

Calling bank all day 🏦 🏀 We’re looking back at some of the best shots from the NBA Conference Finals. Tune in to see who takes home the ring, and dive deep on your favorite moments with simulations in Search. 

Proud sponsor of the NBA.
There's so much to unpack with May's Gemini Drops  📦 Here’s the complete breakdown of everything new this month ➡️

Tilt your phone back, look up from the charger hole, and execute the maneuver! ⭐🦊

You have 1 unread message from @le_sserafim! Search LE SSERAFIM when you want to just stop and breathe 🐱🐯🐍🦢🐥

LE SSERAFIM 으로부터 한 건의 메세지가 도착했습니다. 잠깐 멈춰서 숨을 고르고 싶을 때 구글에서 르세라핌을 검색해보세요.

【LE SERRAFIM から 1 件の未読メッセージがあります💌】ちょっと一息つきたい時は、「LE SSERAFIM」を検索してみてね。🐱🐯🐍🦢🐥

Catch up on all the Gemini app updates from #GoogleIO in 90 seconds. Drop your favorite new update below 👇

SynthID, our imperceptible watermark for AI-generated content, is expanding to more partners.

We’re also adding new ways to find out if content was generated using AI - just ask in the @GoogleGemini app or in @Google Search. 

Find out more at the link in bio 🔗
Universal Cart is your new hub for shopping on Google. 🛍️ Add things to your cart whether you're shopping on Search, the Gemini app, YouTube or Gmail. See how it works. #GoogleIO

The future of intelligent eyewear is coming this fall. 👓
Here’s your first look at our upcoming audio glasses, designed in partnership with @SamsungMobile, @GentleMonster and @WarbyParker. Blending style with hands-free help from @GoogleGemini, they’re made to keep you connected while staying in the moment.

Introducing Gemini Spark ✨ a 24/7 personal AI agent that helps you navigate your digital life. Set recurring tasks, teach it new skills and create complete workflows. #GoogleIO

Gemini 3.5 Flash has landed.

Same same, but different. 🎬 Upload any clip to Gemini Omni and prompt to make the edits you want to see. #GoogleIO

Gemini Omni can create anything from any input - starting with video. 🪄

It combines Gemini’s intelligence with our generative media models - representing a leap forward in world understanding, multimodality, and editing. Swipe to learn more ➡️
